query.pmd[description]: Welcome to USPS.com. Track packages, pay and print postage with Click-N-Ship, schedule free package pickups, look up ZIP Codes, calculate postage prices, and find everything you need for sending mail and shipping packages.
query.pmd[keywords]: USPS, Postal Service, Postal Store, buy stamps, free shipping supplies, informed delivery, mail previews, Click-N-Ship, online postage, track packages, hold mail, forward mail, free package pickup, postage calculator, ZIP Code Lookup, Find a Post Office
